parity-plain-text.description: Same prompt → identical StreamFrame[] shape across all adapters. id+usage vary, ignored in parity check.

parity-single-tool-call.description: Single tool_call to scan_site({url:'https://example.com'}). id is provider-specific; parity check compares name+args only.

parity-invalid-json-tool-args.description: Malformed tool_call args JSON (truncated). Baseline behavior per adapter: OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama each emit either (a) an error frame with code='invalid_response' and retryable=true, OR (b) a tool_calls frame with best-effort-parsed args (empty object fallback). Parity CI checks that ALL three adapters pick the same branch for the same truncated input.
